reviews.title: Dịch vụ tệ hại
reviews.text:
Một trải nghiệm quá tồi tệ đặc biệt từ đội ngũ sales, lễ tân của khách sạn làm rất tốn thời gian và tiền.
1. Check in muộn 2 tiếng
2. Check in nhầm phòng cho khách, mở cửa bên trong có một đôi nam nữ đang ngủ.
3. Gửi booking id cho sales để kiểm tra tư vấn trước cả tháng nhưng phản hồi chậm và đọc email của khách không kỹ. Gửi email là 2 mã đặt phòng lại check có 1 và khi khách gửi email báo lại thì không thấy phản hồi.
reviews.response:
Kính gửi Quý khách,
Cảm ơn Quý khách đã dành thời gian chia sẻ những góp ý đầy thiện chí sau kì nghỉ vừa qua tại khu nghỉ dưỡng Vinpearl Resort Nha Trang.   
Chúng tôi rất lấy làm tiếc và chân thành xin lỗi đến quý khách vì những bất tiện xảy ra trong kỳ nghỉ. Chúng tôi xin ghi nhận những góp ý của quý khách và làm việc với các bộ phận liên quan để xử lý ngay nhằm cải thiện chất lượng dịch vụ.
Mục tiêu hàng đầu của Vinpearl Resort Nha Trang là mang lại sự thoải mái, hài lòng cho khách hàng. Ban Quản lý khách sạn và toàn thể nhân viên vẫn không ngừng nỗ lực để nâng cao chất lượng dịch vụ, do vậy chúng tôi rất trân trọng những ý kiến phê bình, góp ý của Quý khách hàng để có thể khắc phục thiếu sót và hoàn thiện hơn nữa.

Trân trọng,   
Ban Quản lý Khách sạn
Vinpearl Resort Nha Trang

reviews.title: Almost booked it for my next trip, but no, never again

Everything was all great until I got double charges.

After our trip, we really wanted to go back there again until I saw the double charges on my credit card after out stay. Never again will we go back here.
reviews.negatives:
What I didn’t like took over what I liked. They charged me twice. It might be due to their pos machine not working as expected. But still, it’s not something you would expect in a resort like this. It took a while to get a refund on the 2nd payment, calls after calls.

According to my bank, Vinpearl’s bank should disclose the information they were asking them to release my funds back. Back it took calls after calls to make them follow up their bank and reply to the said email of my bank.

It was so frustrating as well to contact their customer service only to be passed to the receptionist, to the front desk, and once, to the agent who even forwarded me to Vinpearl Resort and Spa when he totally understood that my case is with Vinpearl Resort. So unprofessional in handling the double charges case, so disappointing, not something you would expect to a “high-end” pricey resort like this

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: I find Nha Trang to be a vibrant city with a plethora of activities and attractions.
reviews.negatives:
The Vinpearl Nha Trang resort did not meet my expectations. The three-bedroom villa we occupied was in a state of disrepair. The hot water was not functioning, and water was leaking from the ceiling. The housekeeping services were inadequate, with insufficient towels and toilet paper provided. The villa was in need of maintenance, with numerous issues such as stains on the walls, missing grout on the tiles, and stained furnitures and countertops. I am perplexed as to how this resort has a five-star rating.

In contrast, my experience at the Hoi An Vinpearl Resort last year was exceptional. The resort was aesthetically pleasing and offered an extensive and diverse breakfast selection, reminiscent of a Sunday brunch every day. Based on this positive experience, I had high expectations for the Vinpearl Nha Trang resort, but unfortunately, it fell short.

While some of the staff were friendly and helpful, others seemed uninterested in assisting us, possibly due to language barriers. Despite this, the resort was adequately staffed, and most of the employees were courteous.

Overall, I would not recommend the Vinpearl Nha Trang resort and would not return.

Rubbish on the carpet near the door, NO hot water in the bath tub or shower. Quite disappointing to have 2 plumbers in your room fixing hot water issue on New Year’s Eve. The fridge wasn’t cold at all. Just one socket working . A lamp at the bedside table didn’t work either. On top of, our bags were taken to the mainland after the checkout what we DIDNOT ask about. reviews.title: Awful - avoid if you can
reviews.text:
You can read all of the other negative reviews here; the shortcomings of this property have been well-documented. 

We thought "how bad can it be, really? I mean, the pool looks amazing!"

Well, as it turns out: just awful. Major issues during our 3 day stay included:

- Disorganization en-masse (nobody seems to know what they're doing, or what's going on)

- Poor / no  English spoken by  almost everyone (and the people who DO know what they're doing/what's going on can't communicate with you) 
 
- Rude staff (just downright argumentative)

- Inflexible transportation (you can't walk anywhere on this resort; it's buses only)

- Terrible food (a buffet with no other options; my wife got food poisoning!)

- Dated rooms (shabby; run down)

- Remnants of cigarette smoking everywhere
 
- Pool closes at 7:00 PM

Definitely avoid this place if you can.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Spacious and comfortable room. When we had an issue with a leaking shower, the staff eventually changed our room and sent a complimentary fruit plate as an apology, which was a nice gesture. The resort is beautifully located, and transfers are convenient. The beach is cleaned regularly. It’s easy to get to the city, where you can find great restaurants with delicious food at reasonable prices.
reviews.negatives: Despite listing two children during the booking, we were asked to pay extra for one child upon arrival — apparently due to a mistake on Booking’s side. Our original room had a leaking shower, and it took three days and multiple reminders to get a new one. Currency exchange is limited and unreliable — often only $100 available per day, if any. There’s a lot of plastic waste in the sea, even though the beach is cleaned. No animation or entertainment activities available. Dinner at the hotel (around $85 for three) was a big disappointment — bland, repetitive food and only filtered tap water as a beverage. Fruits were of poor quality. For good food, we had to go to the city, where a quality dinner for three (with alcohol) costs around $40–50 and is far more enjoyable.

reviews.text: Stay at Vinpearl resort for 2 night with party of 10 included 2 children. We had 4 rooms . 2 of the room had extra bed in result in lack of space to walk . Poorly set up I must say. Staff is poor with English and can not answer most of question asked but they seem to guess the answer . However I notice the hotel seem to cater more for Korean customer and Russian customers. The daily entertainment offer by hotel is poor. The facilities offer to children seem only last for maximum 30 mins . Although this suppose to be all inclusive hotel but many facilities are charge at very high priced. Food at this hotel is poor . Definately cannot rate the buffet is from a 5 star hotel. Overly rated is my final though. Will not return
reviews.positives: Hotel pool is great and private beach is clean

reviews.title: Beautiful hotel, inconvenient location, no good eating options
reviews.positives: Beautiful beach and swimming pools, we had a villa, it was very spacious.
reviews.negatives:
Very hard to get to this resort, need to take speed boat or cable car from Nha Trang. Cable cars were always busy so we only took speed boat. It runs every 30 minutes, so if you miss it, you need to wait another 30 mins. After the speedboat, you need to wait for the hotel car again to drive you to the resort. As we stayed at villa, we need to transfer to another car to drive us from the the main lobby of the hotel. 

Not so many eating options, we had dinner at Jasmine restaurant and the food was the worst we ever had in Vietnam. The breakfast buffet room was very busy, a lot of food choices but not high quality food. We had dinner buffet a few times and they let you pay at the entrance before you even start eating, then they chase you in the middle of dinner to pay for your drinks. They charges extra if you bring your own food to the hotel but they really have no options in the hotel. 

The staffs are friendly but a lot of them can’t speak English. This hotel seems like a destination for local people. 

One of our bedroom air conditioners was broken and one of the toilets was leaking during our stay, the water pressure is low in the villa and the water was not hot enough for shower.

reviews.title: What a terrible experience!

reviews.title: A package holiday type resort beside Vinwonders
reviews.positives:
A good resort on Hon Tre island beside Vinwonders park. Got a good pool. We enjoyed the buffet breakfast.
It is fun taking the cable car and boat to and fro the island when you arrive/depart or if going in to Nha Trang town.
We enjoyed a day at Vinwonders - don't need longer than this unless you are wanting to spend days in the water park (our kids were too small for this).
reviews.negatives:
We had tried to get two rooms connecting for our young family. The room configuration that we selected when we arrived, it was apparent it wouldn't work, so asked about changing to one bigger room (which would have been quite a bit cheaper if we'd booked it originally). This was quite a hassle to do even though the room was available. We weren't able to get any of the difference refunded which was disappointing. 
The other guests were almost exclusively Russians on package holidays and often not very polite and courteous to others in the breafast queue etc. 
The water of the beach itself wasn't particularly clear or inviting, so we mainly swam in the pools.
It is quite a way back to the harbour if you don't want to eat every lunch/dinner at the expensive resort restaurants (our booking only included breakfast).

reviews.title: Disappointing - Poor service, lack of food options, but great beach
reviews.text:
This was out third visit to Vinpearl - the 2nd one being almost 5 years back. We stayed in a Deluxe Ocean View.
The arrival at the hotel was a horrid experience - the mainland reception area was extremely crowded, and it took us more than one hour from entry into the reception to getting into our room. When we arrived we had to keep asking for luggage assistance despite booking an airport pickup through the hotel.
The view from the room was really nice, the pool was amazing, and the beach was very clean. 
Service was poor - the buggy service runs at fixed intervals and they will not get an additional buggy even if the current one is bursting. One time they packed us into a really crowded buggy - it was a little upsetting especially traveling with a four year old. Buffet is the only option, a la carte is available only via room service and the options are limited. The food quality is average. Lunch buffet runs for a really short time so it's not really a relaxing experience. 
English is a bit of an issue (as other travelers also mentioned). We were able to manage as we speak a little Vietnamese. Most staff are not very polite, exception being the staff at the Lobby Bar who were amazing all three days we were there.
It's not really great value for money - despite being hotel guests you need to buy separate tickets to the amusement park. Might as well stay in a better hotel and do a day trip to the park.
Overall we were very disappointed - we went back with our son because we loved the place the last 2 times, but this time around the hotel standards seem to have slipped really hard. Would never go back again.
reviews.room_type: Grand Deluxe Ocean View Double Room

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: I gave a 7 because we stayed 5 nights and 4 nights we had no hot water not even after 2 claims at the reception, we receive just apologies and a plate of fruits but still no hot water. For a 5 star hotel is not acceptable to not have hot water. The furnature is old also the building is called delux building. They have a really big pool and a very nice beach, transport with cable or boat are good and free.

reviews.title: It's like a fancy prison
reviews.text: Full of Chinese and Russians with cash and loud voices.. Hotel is nice and big rooms but everything else is additional like renting a bike or a sea kayak. What surprised us was with that many rooms, there were no eating options at night except the expensive buffet and roomservice.. Checking in took over an hour, checking out half an hour, problems with cards, breakfast and they tried charging a broken glass to our bill even though it was housekeepings fault. Nothing g to do on island except the amusement park.  Pool is amazing which is why we went so the kids had a great time but not the adults.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives:
We payed a large amount of money for the Christmas party, only to be left highly disappointed. The buffet was cold and the lamb was uncooked and tough, prepared out doors with no warmer buns so by the time it was open for service, it was already cold. 

There was a Santa visit for the children, our 3 year old received a sponsored can of Coca Cola as a Christmas gift which was extremely disappointing not only for a toddler, but for a paying family.

reviews.title: service is in retrograde
reviews.text:
Firstly, this is not my first time been in Vinpearl nha trang resort, I've been in this resort last year, but the impression was so disappointed during this time when I was there.

reviews.title: Disappointing and dirty
reviews.text:
We stayed one night at Vinpearl Resort for VinWonders. The resort is large but dated, with many broken furnishings.

The lobby is cold, playing the same three propaganda songs on repeat.

The pool was filthy—hair, bugs, and dirt even early morning, making swimming impossible.

The private beach was dirty, littered with cigarette butts and plastic. Not what you expect from a 5-star resort.

Service was poor—reception and pool staff were rude and unhelpful.

Breakfast was good, with a decent selection and quality.

The room was small with paper-thin walls; we heard neighbors shouting late into the night.

No signage from VinWonders to the hotel, and luggage takes two hours to reach the mainland after checkout—plan accordingly.

Overall, a disappointing stay.

reviews.title: Unexpected and disappointing ocean view room and service
reviews.text:
I booked an ocean-view room for two nights and had a very poor experience, encountering three major issues:

1. Room does not match online images: The ocean-view room was not as shown in the pictures online. The hotel only has four floors, and even the rooms facing the ocean have obstructed views, with some rooms facing the pool instead of the ocean.

2. **Poor sound insulation**: The connecting room doors have poor sound insulation, allowing clear sounds from the neighboring room. Sometimes I worry about disturbing other guests.

3. **Poor quality beach**: When I arrived at the beach at noon, there was an unpleasant odor that made me not want to go into the water at all.

When I raised the issue about the ocean-view room at the front desk, the receptionist kept repeating that the hotel was fully booked and that I could not change rooms on the first day. They offered to switch me to another room on the second floor the next day, but I would have to pay an extra 300,000 VND. I didn’t understand why I would need to pay to switch to another room that still faced trees. I then asked the receptionist to check with the hotel about arrangements and left my contact information, but after 24 hours, I still hadn’t heard back. When I inquired again, they informed me that I would be checking out the next day and that no arrangements could be made.

In the end, I had to insist on meeting the hotel manager multiple times out of frustration before any compensation was offered. Throughout the process, I faced the receptionist’s unhelpful and indifferent attitude. Even after the manager offered compensation, it did not alleviate my anger. I hope this review advises others to choose wisely. I was initially attracted by the slightly lower price compared to other hotels, but if I had known that the online images did not match reality, I would not have chosen this hotel, regardless of the lower price.

reviews.title: Great location, but...
reviews.text:
Vinpearl Resort Nha Trang is a island resort with its own theme park, underwater world, and water theme park. Free arcade games in the indoor games was arcade-heaven for my son. Vinpearl has a lovely beach with safe peaceful waters. Transportation on the island was prompt and easy to get. The rooms are good-sized, with good housekeeping. The small issue we had with blockage in the separate shower cubicle was sorted out promptly. 

However, that being said, my family and I were not that happy with our vacation at Vinpearl. The reasons were:
1. Very hard and uncomfortable beds with a thin topper that has given me backache till now.
2. The same types of food were served at the daily buffets that came with the package - little imagination or thought given to the menu planning. As the resort is on an island on its own, there was little we could do to eat something else, other than going to the mainland, which required taking a motorised tuk-tuk, speedboat and taxi to town.
3. Guests comprised mainly local Vietnamese and Russians. The hotel obviously caters to the Russian market as there were limited English DVDs which we could borrow from the business centre.
4. MIni-golf course was not maintained and overrun with tall grass.
5. Inadequate facilities for indoor sports games - only 1 pool table and 1 table-tennis table.
6. Water theme park - a few rides were not open.

While Vinpearl is a premier resort in Vietnam, it still has a long way to go before it can claim the same in Asia. However, it has a lot of potential which has yet to be realised.
reviews.positives: Beautiful beach, peaceful waters, good-sized rooms

The staff are friendly, helpful and speak English. The breakfast was exceptional.
reviews.negatives: The room facilities facing the hillside could be improved. The room lighting was too dim. For a five star resort only 2 complimentary bottles of water were provided. The meals at the restaurants are over priced.

The Water park is also great fun and the cable car gives great views and access to the mainland.  Now for the negative, the buffets are average at best, cold, tasteless food most of the time, we ordered from room service or the Beachcomber bar just to get fresh cooked food.  It is defintely a family location, teeming with kids.  Not that this is a negative, but we were the only Australians and probably English speakers there.  Most guest were Asian or Russian (which is fine).  The problem was that the staff couldn't communicate very well in English, especially to non English speakers.  The bed was a disgrace, it would have been better sleeping on the floor.
This maybe 5 star in Vietnam, but not in most other contries in the world.  4 star at best.

reviews.title: over rated resort
reviews.text: Wife and i stayed 3 nights. Deluxe room was 3 star at best. Hardwood floors were all scuffed up and old looking. room furnishings were old, outdated, and ugly. More than half of the cable television channels (all except the public channels) were not functioning for 2 of our 3 days stay. The pool was cold and given the cold weather they should have had some heated swimming or soaking, no jaccussi or hot tub. Besides a short beach walk there was NOTHING to do in the resort. The activities were quite lame, like the "learn to stand on a surfboard in the pool" activity for example. No resort entertainment. The amusement park was a disappointment. The rides were good for 10 yr olds and below. The park ride attendants were poorly trained and the lines, although short due to lack of guests, took long to process due to inefficient staff. Food was ok and variety over three nights was appreciated. Overall, the resort was not worth the cost. We will not return.

reviews.title: Great Resort But Needs Well Trained Staff
reviews.text:
Vinpearl is a very relaxing and beautiful resort.  Your arrival is greeted with friendly staff and then by the stunning views when riding on the cable car to get to the hotel.

However, staff at the themed park and water park did not seem to have sufficient training to ensure safety. An incident whereby staff allowed another person to go down the water slide when my wife was still at the bottom of the slide ! It caused her to jump out to avoid collision but fell over instead.  Luckily there was no serious injury.

The buffet food is just average but the variety is good.

The Russian guests were very rude in many ways - queue jumping, impolite and, very agro.

Overall a good stay but the Resort and their staff seem to treat the foreigners better than their countrymen, whether the locals or the repatriates (also known as Viet Kieu).

reviews.title: Would expect great service for the price you pay
reviews.text:
Checked into Vinpearl for a 2 night stay. Initial thoughts were that the hotel wing we were staying was a bit old. The hotel has a great pool though with amazing views of the beach. Was a bit dissapointed about the service as they were quite rigid at certain times. e.g on the day we were checking out, we got around 5-6 calls reminding us to be on time else we will miss the airport transfer (that was provided by the hotel). The hotel has two good buffet restuarants where the staff here were very polite and of course great food. They have another alarcarte restuarant by the pool, but the quality of the food was not upto standard. Nice band playing by the pool though. The amusement park is good especially for kids. 
Overall i would say that i would not return to stay at the hotel

reviews.title: Nice place with bad service
reviews.text:
one issue has given me a bad impression.
When I check-in my room for the 1st day, something very bad happened. My wife and I just entered the room for about 1 hour. It is really tired for both of us, therefore, my wife was sleeping and I was having a bath. At that time,suddenly we hear somebody talking loudly outside, which is about showing another group of guests into there own room. But to my surprise, the staff used some kind of card to open my room and one kid ran into my room and jumped onto the bed. My wife was scared. And I was really angry about this. There should have been someone who come to apologize for this issue, however, there was nobody. 
We had to kindly ask the kid to go out, but he made our room in a mass. No staff came in to forbid the kid. Even his parents did not come in. I think I will not come back to Vinpearl again cuz I don't wanna live with so many people of low moral standard.
I reported this issue to the check-in desk, but ridiculously they can not give any response,and held this issue for almost 3 hours until I went to the desk to ask for reason again. More ridiculously is that your staff gave me an explanation saying: our staff planned to put your luggage inside your room, therefore, he opened the door. Actually, after the kid came in, my wife went out immediately to see who the fxxk is out there, but she saw one young man staff with no luggage car. We were very careful about the luggage, we are pretty sure, your relevant transportation team spent at least 1.5 to 2 hour to send our luggage to the outside of hotel. How dare the check-in staff explain the guy broke into our room in order to give us the luggage. 
This is really bad experience for us. Later we found that the kid live with his parents and grandma nearby our room. 
The most logic explanation is that your staff showed them the wrong room, otherwise why the kid broke inside and acted crazy.
Why staff cheat? Why can't they sincerely apologize?

reviews.title: Not all its cracked up to be...
reviews.text:
Look.... the rooms were nice and tudy... the buildings are all delightful...
The beach, the theme park, the cable car over, the boat transfers etc all run smoothly..

However... probably through my own mistakes, i didnt realise i would be stuck eating buffets 3 times a day and not being given more choices.

I didnt like how every member of your party had to carry an identification card, it is not explained on arrive... i saw multiple people suffer the same fate at restaurants, being sent off to retrieve all cards...

A very large number of staff were trainees... and it showed.
I expected a language barrier so thats fine... as i found more experience management to be very helpful. Just not many others.

I felt like i was being restricted in what i could and couldnt do... as if your choices were being taken out from under you

reviews.title: Great resort, wish we stayed longer!
reviews.positives: Being on the island felt very nice, it was very calm and peaceful. Taking the cable cars and speed boats into Nha Trang is pretty easy except sometimes it’s hard to get a Grab from the cable car station. The resort itself is very nice, it has a big pool, the beach is beautiful, and the facilities are good. There are also nice areas to walk next to the beach and next to gardens and temples. The breakfast is very good as well with multiple options. Being close to Vinwonder is very cool, I enjoyed seeing all the Vinwonder areas as they are very interesting and unique.

reviews.title: Extremely bad experience at a cost of over USD 1000 for 2 nights stay with two rooms.
reviews.text:
My whole trip got completely spoiled for series of unfortunate things:
1. Before going there I called and also booked the ticket for Vinpearl Land for the whole stay. But the information was not passed and thus I was asked for a 30% higher price. They corrected it only after I showed the email confirmation.
2. They mistakenly charged my card with VND 35 million instead of 3.5 million and then cancelled again.
3. I checked for connecting room over telephone 1 day before arrival but the reception did not have any information. 
4. Finally I confirmed 1 queen bed and 1 twin bed connecting room at the main land reception. But when I got the rooms I saw both are twin beds. Finally they took almost an hour to find out another connecting rooms and gave me.
5. Check in time is 2 pm and accordingly I plaaned my activities. But their rooms were not ready thus gave me the rooms almost an hour later and spoiled my schedule not only for that but the whole trip. 
6. Rooms were very shabby

La villa era un sueño, el desayuno espectacular, el servicio de habitaciones fantástico, la playa muy bonita aunque con bastante plástico en el fondo y cuidado con la época de medusas. Esta estancia la disfrutamos muchísimo.
reviews.negatives: El precio es excesivo, el alojamiento está muy bien pero para el destino que es, es muy elevado. Tuvimos un problema con la reserva y necesitábamos cancelar pero la persona que nos atendió vía email, no fue nada flexible y sus contestaciones eran incluso un poco rudas. Al final disfrutamos la estancia pero nos hizo modificar toda la ruta y perdernos algunas cosas.

reviews.title: Good for relax and comfortable stay
reviews.text:
First time stay in Vinpearl Island and definitely will come again.(stay 3night,still not enough). Good breakfast wt variety choice. Staff very polite ,helpful and friendly. We are stay far from the lobby but the hotel having 'Tuk tuk' to send us to everywhere, very convenient and enjoyed with taking hotel 'tuktuk'. It is very convenient to travel to the town because the speedboat is free and it's operate for 24 hours. 
Vinpearl Amusement park is worth to go, must have a try. Amazing view in the sunset from cable car. VAP ticket can get from the counter or 'Klook' apps which is more cheaper. Having a beautiful beach view and Eye of VinpearLand when the lights switch on. 

CONS : I hope housekeeping can do something on the room carpets, it's old and dirty. A lot of Stain on it.

reviews.title: Magnifique plage et piscine, très confortable, mais nourriture indigne d'un 5 étoiles
reviews.positives: Magnifique vue sur la mer depuis la chambre. Personnel souriant, serviable et amical. Petit déjeuner avec beaucoup d'options. Très belle piscine et très belle plage, sans être bondé, a certain moment nous étions même tout seul dans la gigantesque piscine. Un endroit vraiment parfait pour se reposer, avec un excellent rapport qualité-prix.
reviews.negatives:
Le prix des boissons, 50'000 vnd pour une simple bouteille d'eau. Prix des plats très cher, alors je comprends c'est les prix d'un 5 étoiles, mais la nourriture était vraiment indigne d'un 5 étoiles, fade, sans goût et ne respectant jamais les recettes et goût originaux.
Spagetthi carbonara sans gout et avec une texture bizarre, pizza moyenne, burger moyen sans gout et sans âme, plat "thaï" qui n'ont rien avoir avec les recettes originales. Le tom kha kaï et le pad thaï était une blague. À croire que le chef n'a jamais gouter ou consulter les recettes d'origine.

Le pire c'était le buffet du soir que nous avons pris le premier jour, une blague pour 750'000vnd ! Des sushis ressemblant de loin à du saumon mais qui sont enfete à la carotte ! À croire que cela était fait exprès pour tromper le client. Des plats sans goût uniquement le barbecue était pas mal, mais vraiment pauvre en choix, une pure déception !

J'ai rarement été autant deçu de la nourriture tout hotel confondu, c'est une honte pour un hotel 5 étoiles et surtout à ce prix.

Le point positif en terme de nourriture était le petit-déjeuner, ou je n'ai pas grand chose à dire.

Le meilleur plat que nous avons mangé était des nouilles prises à l'exterieur de l'hotel dans un petit stand du parc d'attraction, c'est dire.

reviews.title: overpriced for a five star hotel
reviews.text:
1. the check-in is extremely slow, we checked in on mainland reception, this took about 40 mins, so we decided to take speed boat to the island. However when we got to the hotel by tuktuk, we were told the room is still not ready, so we had to wait another 45 mins at least, after i asked for 3 times, finally they got someone to check the room personally and came back saying the room is ready. so the total checkin time is about 2 hrs. this is not worth the stay if you only stay for one night on the island. 
2. I called the reception and after explaining the situation they finally agreed to let me check out at 1pm i asked for 2pm, however the next day we were getting called twice and people came twice to rush us from 12pm and we have to hurry packing and checked out at 12:45pm.
3. the shower problem, the water coming from shower nozzle is almost close to the wall that i cant even take shower, and we were just on the 4th floor, also the water is not hot enough. This is definitely not 5 star standard.
reviews.positives: clean, swimming pool can be used after check out before leaving the island, location and parks

reviews.title: Big bucks but lacking class
reviews.text: if you want to sit by a pool this is the place for you. pool and beach right next to each other, vinpearl land was pretty tacky but good if you have kids. rooms were average for the price,crappy fridge and very pokey specially if you need xtra bed for your child(ren)
reviews.positives: Great location

reviews.title: Lage top, Service kühl
reviews.positives: Die Lage ist traumhaft, man hat viel Privatsphäre, der Strand und Poolbereich ist sehr schön. Es ist der perfekte Ort um ein paar Tage abzuschalten. Das Jasmine Restaurant bietet hervorragenden Service.
reviews.negatives: Das Personal war verglichen mit anderen Hotels in Vietnam sehr kühl. Die wenigsten Mitarbeiter*innen konnten Englisch sprechen und es gab keine herzliche Atmosphäre (Ausnahme Jasmine Restaurant). Die Restaurant bieten nur sehr wenige vegetarische Optionen und z.T. war in vegetarischen Gerichten Fleisch. Auch beim Frühstück ist die Auswahl an vegetarischen Sachen sehr begrenzt, was bei der Fülle an Essen sehr schade ist.

reviews.title: Awesome beach and pool
reviews.text: kids and adults alike love the pool. husband says the golf course is one of the best that he has been to. lots of attractions for the kids, including the aquarium, amusement park (small for adults but kids don't care), water show, and kids club. however, the foods fell short of expectation. even though quantity and variety are abundant, the buffet tastes like a china bear buffet, not fresh like a coastal resort's foods should be. luckily, it was a short ride into town to get fresh seafood. staffs were rigid and were not ready to accommodate guests' requests. we came in a big group of 10 so we asked to pull three small tables together. first they didn't want to do it saying they wouldn't have time to pull them apart   in time for the next parties, plenty of lame excuses like that. i insisted, telling them we would pull the tables apart before we leave for them, then they said okay, and that they would do it for us. and that's not the only one occasion, there were plenty of little things like that.
reviews.positives: Great pool and beach setting

reviews.title: War entspannend mit gutem und freundlichen Service
reviews.positives: Ausstattung, Lage, Service und die Abgeschiedenheit.
reviews.negatives: Vorgegebene Regeln wurden nicht durchgesetzt, z.B. Kleiderordnung und Rauchverbot im Restaurant.

reviews.title: Ein unvergessliches Erlebnis
reviews.positives: Die Villa mit eigenem Pool direkt am Stand ist einfach einmalig schön und bleibt und sicherlich noch lange in Erinnerung. Das große Frühstücksbuffet mit riesiger Auswahl und den tollen Vin Wonder Park werden wir auch nicht vergessen. Einfach allen in allem ein top Erlebnis. Für die Kids gibt es bis 21Uhr einen netten Kids Room mit Aussenspielplatz. Der Pool und der Strand sind sehr schön. Der rasche Room Service mit guter, internationaler Auswahl sind ein weiteres Plus im Hotel. Der Spa ist sehr zu empfehlen.
reviews.negatives: Leider war die Villa nicht bis in jede Ecke geputzt und einpaar Dinge waren etwas schadhaft, wie die Betten oder die Fliesen im Pool, doch die Reinigung des Pools, die Pflege der Gärten und Anlagen sind gut.

reviews.title: The atmosphere is nice.
reviews.text: The atmosphere by the pool is nice, close to the beach, and early morning golf is possible. The breakfast and overall ambiance are very satisfying. You can also exchange money at the desk. You need to check in before taking the cable car, which takes some time. However, the cleanliness of the room and pool is lacking.

reviews.title: 8nt stay
reviews.text:
Very impressive reception area on the mainland. We took ferry over with our luggage and then bus to hotel.
Upon reaching hotel there was no one to help with our luggage or point us in the direction of where to go, very poor service / first impression.
We paid for 2 x Grand Deluxe room, they were not "Grand" or "Deluxe", very basic rooms. I even double checked that we had in fact been allocated the correct rooms, we had. 
Pool area and beach were lovely.

reviews.title: Decent Stay
reviews.text:
Vinpearl Nha Trang Resort boasts a stunning location and courteous staff. However, several shortcomings hampered my overall experience.

 * Check-In Process: The check-in process was excessively time-consuming, exceeding an hour despite arriving before the designated time. The wait was further extended due to the villa not being fully prepared.
 * Pool Safety: Broken tiles around the swimming pool area posed a safety hazard for guests.
 * Room Service: The room service experience was unsatisfactory. The food delivery time was unreasonably long, and all dishes arrived cold.
 * Uneven Floorboards: The floorboards in our villa were uneven, creating gaps throughout the rooms. This posed a tripping hazard and detracted from the overall comfort of the stay.

I recommend streamlining the check-in process to minimize wait times and ensuring villas are prepared for guest arrival. Additionally, a thorough inspection of the pool area is necessary to address any broken tiles. Finally, improvements are required to ensure room service meals are delivered promptly and at the proper temperature. Addressing the uneven floorboards in the villas would also significantly enhance guest comfort.

While the resort's setting and staff attentiveness were commendable, the aforementioned issues hindered my stay.

reviews.text:
I have extensively travelled and the Vinpearl in Danang fits into my top 5 customer service hotels. This hotel relies on groups and the front desk frankly are badly trained and the worst front desk staff I have experienced in Vietnam.

The door lock would not work on my children's room. 'wait please' . So we waited outside the room for 15 minutes before I went down to find no action. The next morning it happened again. I went down and asked for it to be fixed while we had breakfast. After breakfast..no action. The concierge tries to fix. Where are the engineers? Swimming pools and beach-fantastic. Rooms good. Restaurants expensive and unless you go 'buffet' there are no suitable kids meals. Oh yes, I guess 95% of guests visit the Vinpearl amusement park. There is zero information in the rooms, front desk told me a price and said just go. They neglected to tell me if I don't buy at front desk I cannot leave the park and if I buy at the park it is cash only. Vinpearl please listen!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Het resort bevindt zich op een eiland waar je alleen met kabelbaan of speedboat kan komen. De kinderen vonden de kabelbaan erg leuk. Er zijn meerdere resorts en een soort van pretparkgebeuren. Alles is van de Vingroup waardoor alles hetzelfde sausje heeft gekregen. Kamer was op zich prima maar ook niet bijzonder. Personeel is behulpzaam.

Wij zijn hier vooral geweest om de vakantie af te sluiten met een waterpark voor de kinderen. Het eiland is een vrij hysterische bedoening waar je van moet houden. Voor ons was twee nachten voldoende.

Verder lijken bijna alleen Russen de weg naar het eiland te vinden. Op zich niks mis mee, wel eentonig.
reviews.negatives:
In zowel het hotel als de rest van het eiland/pretpark wordt de godganse dag hetzelfde vietnam adoratie nummer gedraaid. Zelfs op de gang van onze kamer. Dit staat ook nog eens zo luid dat het het slapen bemoeilijkt. Gelukkig is het personeel op verzoek bereid om het uit te zetten. De volgende ochtend om 6:30 staat het echter vrolijk weer aan. 

Het hotel/eiland heeft een lastig te begrijpen transportsysteem van XL golfkarren. Het is moeilijk te doorgronden hoe je waar komt en de chauffeurs geven vaak verschillende antwoorden op dezelfde vragen waardoor het soms een zoektocht was hoe we ergens kwamen. Sowieso ontbeert het eiland fatsoenlijke bewegwijzering zodat het verblijf een aaneenschakeling van zoektochten is.

reviews.negatives:
1. De schoonmaak was slecht. 3 schoonmakers maakten de kamer schoon in minder dan 5 minuten. wij verbleven 9 nachten, en normaal wordt er dan linnengoed verwisseld in deze periode. Hier dus niet. In dit hotel kreeg ik meerdere bulten (gebeten of gestoken) op mijn lichaam, en ik vermoed dat dit door bedwants komt.

reviews.title: Beautiful location lacking in execution
reviews.text:
Decent resort, but this is no Shangri-la. I'd give it an overall B-. That said, it is the best thing you will find in this location and is worth staying there if you're in Nha Trang. I would not mind staying there again now that I know what to expect.

Pros:
Very pleased they were ready when I arrived on the train from Hanoi. Right where they said they would be, van ready for us, flawless.
Gorgeous ocean views. Grade A
Buffet food is good; all included in room rate. Grade A-
Entertainment is plentiful, with the amusement park and water park being co-located. Grade B+
Not crowded
Prices for drinks and snacks around the resort were very reasonable for the area and significantly lower than what one might pay at any comparable resort

Areas for improvement:
Staff execution lacking. Examples:
- service at bars was very slow, drink menu listed many top shelf liquors but none were available. On different days, lots of, "We're sorry, sir, but that's not available." 
- pool towels - at 2:20 in the afternoon on a sunny day, with the pool only probably 50% occupied, sorry sir, laundry not finished, check back at 3. And no real intent on finishing it, as the huge bundle of towels still sat wet 2 hours later (honestly). 
- The carts that take you between the hotel and the park are really not the best solution, and there aren't enough of them. My kids kept trying to tell us to jump on before the other guests got in our way. This went against our own courteous principles and felt more like boarding a Southwest Airlines plane. Staff response: "Sorry sir, please wait 20 minutes."
-more comments on tripadvisor. this site limits to 2000 characters for some reason.

reviews.title: It's a bit ambiguous, but the cost performance is good.
reviews.text:
It is more reasonable in price than the resorts in Gamla or Amiana, and the rooms are large, making it great for families. It's also close to VinWonders. However, in the pool villa, there were small ants crawling in the bathroom, and the room condition didn't seem to be very cleanly maintained. The water quality in the pool villa was fine; the filter color didn’t change at all over two days!

Additionally, if you are traveling with children under 130 cm, I recommend using the pool villa and main pool within the resort rather than the water park. I gave up the main pool to go to the water park because I heard it was fun, but it was crowded and complicated, and the area for kids was hot and boring, which I regretted.

Oh, while walking around the resort, you can occasionally spot wild monkeys on the paths or in the trees. There are also lizards.

As for breakfast at the restaurant, I wouldn't recommend the breads in the bread corner, except for the pancakes or waffles that are freshly made. There are a lot of sparrows inside the restaurant enjoying their breakfast from the bread corner.

Overall, the facilities are impressive, but there was a situation where I didn’t receive my passport during late-night check-in at the terminal, so I had to contact the reception the next day to get it back. The beach and pool villa were picturesque, but I found myself questioning if it was worth the price if I hadn't received much discount from Agoda. The kids who came along loved having stairs to play on and run around!

reviews.title: Khách sạn tốt, nhưng câng cải thiện
reviews.text:
Điểm tốt:

Vị trí: Khách sạn nằm ở vị trí thuận tiện, dễ dàng di chuyển đến các khu vui chơi và các địa điểm giải trí. Đây là một điểm cộng lớn cho những gia đình hoặc nhóm bạn đi nghỉ dưỡng.

Dịch vụ: Dịch vụ y tế tại khách sạn rất tận tâm, nhân viên hỗ trợ 24/7 và luôn sẵn sàng giúp đỡ khi có vấn đề phát sinh. Điều này tạo cảm giác an tâm cho khách lưu trú.

Phòng ốc: Phòng ở đầy đủ tiện nghi và tương xứng với mức giá, đáp ứng tốt nhu cầu cho cả chuyến đi ngắn ngày hoặc dài ngày.


Điểm cần cải thiện:

Dọn vệ sinh: Thời gian dọn vệ sinh phòng cần được cải thiện. Ví dụ, sáng tôi rời khách sạn để đi khu vui chơi và trở về vào buổi trưa, nhưng phòng vẫn chưa được dọn. Điều này ảnh hưởng đến trải nghiệm nghỉ ngơi, đặc biệt khi khách cần một không gian sạch sẽ để thư giãn.

Nhận diện khách hàng: Gia đình tôi đã ở khách sạn này 4 lần trong năm nay, nhưng mỗi lần đến đều phải làm thủ tục như khách mới, chụp lại ảnh thông tin. Điều này thể hiện sự thiếu chuyên nghiệp trong việc ghi nhớ và nhận diện khách hàng thân thiết.

Thang máy: Hệ thống thang máy khá cũ, gây cảm giác không an toàn và không thoải mái khi sử dụng. Đây là vấn đề cần được nâng cấp để cải thiện trải nghiệm tổng thể của khách hàng.

Toilet: Nút xả toilet trong phòng tôi ở có dấu hiệu bị hỏng, khiến việc sử dụng trở nên bất tiện. Khách sạn cần kiểm tra và bảo trì thường xuyên hơn để tránh làm giảm chất lượng dịch vụ.


Kết luận:
Khách sạn có nhiều điểm mạnh nhưng cũng cần chú ý cải thiện các vấn đề trên để nâng cao chất lượng dịch vụ. Nếu những điểm này được khắc phục, tôi tin rằng khách sạn sẽ trở thành lựa chọn tuyệt vời hơn cho các khách hàng trong tương lai.
reviews.response:
Kính gửi Quý khách,
Cảm ơn quý khách và gia đình đã lựa chọn Vinpearl Resort Nha Trang  làm điểm đến cho ký nghỉ vừa qua và đặt biệt cảm ơn Quý khách đã dành thời gian quí báu để gửi lời nhận xét về trải nghiệm trong chuyến đi của mình 
Mục tiêu hàng đầu của Vinpearl Resort Nha Trang là mang đến cho Quý khách hàng những giây phút thư giãn tuyệt đối, những trải nghiệm tuyệt vời nhất nên chúng tôi rất tiếc vì những trải nghiệm của Quý khách không được như mong đợi. Chúng tôi sẽ cố gắng khắc phục & cải thiện dịch vụ của mình dựa trên những góp ý của Quý khách.
Rất mong nhận được sự thông cảm của Quý khách và hy vọng được đón tiếp Quý khách trong tương lai để có cơ hội phục vụ Quý khách với một kỳ nghỉ trọn vẹn nhất.
Trân trọng!
Ban Quản lý Khách sạn
Vinpearl Resort Nha Trang

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
1. 직원들은 친절하고 전반적인 자연환경은 매우 훌륭했습니다.
2. 멋진 해변과 커다란 수영장은 사람들이 마음 편하게 즐기기에 충분했습니다. 다만 1월 중순 날씨가 그렇게 덥지는 않아서 수영장에서 오래 쉴 수 없어서 아쉽더군요.
3. 대체로 건물이 깨끗하고 주변 정리도 잘 되어 있어서 만족했습니다. 특히 빈원더스는 돈이 전혀 아깝지 않을 정도로 쉬고 즐기기에 충분한 곳이었습니다. 리조트 수영장도 좋지만 이곳 해변과 워터슬라이드 이용은 최고의 서비스라 생각됩니다.
4. 단독 풀빌라를 빌려서 투숙했는데 숙소 자체의 공간이 넓고 바다를 볼 수 있는 뷰가 환상적이었습니다. 가족 모두 넓은 공간에서 여유로운 생활을 보낼 수 있었어요.
5. 호텔 조식에서 쌀국수는 최고였습니다.
reviews.negatives:
1. 섬 안에 리조트가 있어서 섬에 들어가는 순간 다른 관광과 음식을 맛볼 수 없어서 아쉬웠습니다. 
2. 풀빌라가 깨끗한 편이었지만 오래된 느낌이었어요.  게다가 개미가 너무 많이 나와서 당황했습니다. 그리고 침대 옆에 콘센트 대부분이 제대로 작동되지 않았는데 이부분은 전체적인 점검이 필요해보입니다.
3. 저녁식사를 조식을 먹었던 식당에서 사먹었는데 바베큐가 식어있다거나 음료수를  돈을 지불하고 사먹어야 하는 것은 불편했습니다. 조식보다 비싼 돈을 내고 사먹는데 그런 기본적인 서비스가 유료인 것이 아쉽더라구요.
4. 다른 날 저녁 식사로 룸서비스를 시켰는데  음식도 그냥 조식 뷔페에서 가져온 느낌이었고 이미 식어서 그냥 별로였습니다. 가족 대부분 의견이 같았습니다.
5. 옆 빌라 두 곳에 새벽에 도착한 중국, 러시아 관광객이 있었는데, 2시간 넘게 크게 떠들고 수영하는 소리가 들려서 잘 쉴 수가 없었어요. 단독 빌라지만 방음이 잘 되지 않습니다.

reviews.title: Good choice for lazy couple
reviews.text:
We planned to go somewhere far from HCM city for our honeymoon like Sapa, Bali (Indonesia)..., but ended up with Nha Trang due to being so lazy to travel. Flight to Nha Trang only took 35 mins plus around 30 mins from Cam Ranh airport to Nha Trang and nearly 5 mins from mainland to Vinpearl island by cano. Seems Vinpearl resort was our good choice as we got everything we need here. Buffet was provided 3 meals per day and already included in room fee, very convenient !!! 

When we stay at resort, we can enjoy all activities of entertainment park without paying any fee. If you just visit island, you must pay around 500 thoundsand VND (~ 25 USD) for one day entrance ticket. Beach is ok & swimming pool was large, having many pool activities and also nice pool for children. Room is just so so, not impressed us much, but it's ok with us as we were outside mostly. 

The good thing when you stay at Vinpearl resort was that you can enjoy night activities of the park without feeling any rush, while other visitors were so hurry for the last cable/ferry leaving island. One thing we recommend that you should enjoy music water show, starts from 7pm to 7:20pm. Dinner buffet is opened from 6pm to 10pm so you can also enjoy before or after the show. Waterpark is good too. Its close to the beach so if you can enjoy both as the sametime.

If you are romantic couple and need quiet & private place, its not really a good choice. Vinpearl resort is the best stay for family and energy couples who would like to explore and enjoy fun activities.  We missed the mermaid show in the afternoon and feel quite regret as we heard it is really good show. However, no worry as we will be back soon !
reviews.positives: Food, entertainment park, swimming pool

reviews.title: Lovely hotel but crowded at this time of year
reviews.text: we stayed 2 nights mid-week with our 2 year old daughter and my wife's vietnamese parent's and niece. my wife and i had visited vinpearl for our honeymoon in 2008 and a few things had changed for the better and worse. the resort was virtually empty in feb 2008 but was extremely busy this time july 2011. the swimming pool remains a favourite place to relax. the beach is now cleaner and has a shark net about 500m off shore. the buffet meals for breakfast, lunch and dinner are ok with a large selection of western and vietnamese food but after 2 days we were looking for something a little different. the initiative of introducing photo id to enter the theme parks is a good idea. we half expected a 'welcome back' when we checked in but instead it was replaced with an argument over whether we had payed for a child's bed in one room we had booked. the childcare room was a godsend for our 2yr old. she could let off steam and the staff in the centre were really friendly.   in western terms the rate per night with buffets is great value but you just need to pick the right time of year to visit.
reviews.positives: Pool, free meals, free entrance to amusement and water park.

reviews.title: Memorable Staycation
reviews.text:
I recently had the pleasure of staying at Vinpearl Resort Nha Trang, and it was truly a memorable experience. From the moment we arrived at the private pier and boarded the speedboat to Hon Tre Island, everything felt premium and well-organized.

The resort itself is stunning — nestled between lush greenery and a beautiful private beach. The room was spacious, clean, and offered a breathtaking view of the ocean. Housekeeping was prompt and attentive throughout our stay.

One of the highlights was the breakfast buffet: a wide variety of both Western and Vietnamese dishes, fresh tropical fruits, and excellent coffee. The staff were incredibly courteous and always willing to assist with a smile. It really made us feel welcome and taken care of.

We also enjoyed access to VinWonders, which is just a short buggy ride away. It was great fun, especially for families or groups looking for entertainment beyond the beach.

The only minor downside was that during peak times, the check-in and check-out process could feel a bit crowded — but the staff handled it efficiently.

Overall, Vinpearl Resort Nha Trang offers a perfect blend of luxury, nature, and Vietnamese hospitality. Highly recommended for couples, families, or anyone looking for a relaxing island getaway.

With our kindest regards from beautiful Vinpearl Resort Nha Trang 
Thank you & best regards, 
Altin Yildiray - General Manager
Vinpearl Resort Nha Trang"

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
我们一家住的villa，villa只有6001到6010是可以直接从房间到沙滩，其他的小别墅看起来离沙滩很近，但实际上要绕很远才能到沙滩和吃饭游玩的地方，尤其是山上那一排villa。如果订不到连着沙滩的villa，还不如订普通的房间，离沙滩和泳池都很近，还更方便更便宜一些。
沙滩非常好，白沙滩又细又软，水很清澈，可以走很远。
岛上吃饭可以不在酒店吃，酒店中餐厅很一般，没什么可选的，可以在岛上码头附近的餐馆吃饭。如果你是坐缆车上岛的，可以问下码头在哪里，岛上码头离缆车站非常近，走几步就能到。从一座小楼走进去，下一楼就能看到，餐馆就在码头两边。
酒店的接驳车分去缆车站、海湾、码头、vinwonder几种，但实际上都不远，在任何一个地方下车，走几步就到其他地方了。但你要是问酒店服务员，他们就有可能告诉你，这个接驳车只到某某地方，让你等下一班，如果你很着急就可以不用管，到地方走几步就好。
来岛上，在大陆的缆车站酒店的接待中心checkin，让他们把行李送到房间，人坐缆车到岛上，离店也可以这样，海上缆车还是很值得坐的。
来芽庄玩，住在岛上，白天坐缆车去大陆上玩和吃当地美食是很好的选择，尤其对于喜欢安静的人，芽庄大陆摩托车太多，又吵又乱。芽庄沙滩也很一般，远不如岛上的沙滩好。
reviews.negatives: 岛上的标识不清晰，刚到岛上一头雾水，酒店也没有岛上中英文地图。

reviews.title: Great Resort if You Have the Money
reviews.text:
Vinpearl Resort delivers on the money.  It is expensive, much more expensive than anything I've been to in Vietnam.  However, the level of service is high.  The staff cleans your room twice a day, there's rose petals on your bed, you get a free bottle of champagne when you get there, chocolate on your pillow...that sort of place.

The water park is free and the most fun you will have there.  There's also some amazing light shows, dolphin shows, animal shows.  If you have been to Vietnam, you'll know what I mean when I say it's all "Vietnamese style".  Nothing is really polished like the West...but it's all uniquely fun in it's own, down to Earth way.  I guess that's the best to describe a lot of attractions in Vietnam.

Anyway, the buffet is top notch, but the funny thing is that the buffet in one hotel building may be a little better than in another.  You can go to any building in a compound.

So you have a waterpark, amusement park with rides, activities that range from light shows to Vietnamese musicians, swimming pools, and shuttles to take you everywhere.

The only drawback is the price.  IMHO, it's worth trying Vinpearl once in your life....but it's much more cost effective to stay at a hotel, or mini-hotel in Nha Trang and just go visit Vinpearl Land one day to use all the rides and fun stuff.  I paid about 250$ a night and I thought that was too steep...but some people have that sort of money, so power to them.

Oh, and for the record, this place is on an island next to Nha Trang.  If you want to experience Nha Trang you travel on a cable car over the ocean and then go take a ride to the city.  Ergo, if you want to see Nha Trang it's better to stay at a hotel in the city.
reviews.positives: water park, buffet, pools
